---
title: 'Publications (8 + 42)'
title-block-banner: true
image: /assets/images/social-profile.png
image-alt: Mickaël CANOUIL
date-format: 'MMMM,<br>YYYY'
body-classes: publications-page
toc: true
listing:
  - id: publications
    contents:
      - publications.yml
    template: ../assets/listing-templates/publications.ejs
    page-size: 1000
    sort: 'issued desc'
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

::: {#publications}
:::
